title: [ci] Valgrind builds failed in Slang
body:
There was a failure in the nightly which appears to be coming from Slang: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/12198427781/job/34030147045#step:6:4717

I haven't verified, but I expect it is related to this CIRCT commit: https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/4a73177e9fff0a95e1d4dc9f97d55e2631405c01
